title: Trim the Brussels bureaucracy budget, says Austria
summary_full: The European Commission last July proposed spending around €104 billion on administration in the next budget cycle, including 2,500 additional civil service posts
summary_public: The European Commission last July proposed spending around €104 billion on administration in the next budget cycle, including 2,500 additional civil service posts
